entities.name: CROP YIELD ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of predicting the amount of crop produced per unit area to inform logistics and insurance.

entities.name: ABIOTIC AND BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental or biological factors that cause crop loss and necessitate yield estimation.

entities.name: REMOTE SENSING TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of satellite imagery and sensors to gather data on crop extent, growth stages, and leaf area index.

entities.name: CROP MODELING
entities.description: The use of mathematical simulations to assess and predict crop yields.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: An Indian state where the yield estimation study was conducted.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where the yield estimation study was conducted.

entities.name: ODISHA
entities.description: An Indian state where the yield estimation study was conducted.

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A satellite providing time series data used for crop classification and remote sensing.

entities.name: LANDSAT 8
entities.description: A satellite providing time series data used for deriving leaf area index and remote sensing.

entities.name: CROP EXTENT
entities.description: The spatial area covered by a specific crop, used to identify locations for yield experiments.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH STAGES
entities.description: The developmental phases of a crop used in yield assessment.

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of leaf area per unit ground surface, crucial for yield assessment and model re-parametrization.

entities.name: CROP CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of identifying crop types using spectral matching and field data.

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to perform crop classification based on spectral signatures from satellite data.

entities.name: CROP CUTTING EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Field-based experiments used to determine observed crop yields for validation.

entities.name: SAVI
entities.description: Soil-adjusted vegetation index used to derive the leaf area index from satellite data.

entities.name: RE-PARAMETRIZATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting crop simulation model parameters using remote sensing data.

entities.name: DATA ASSIMILATION
entities.description: The approach of integrating remotely sensed observations into a crop growth model to improve simulation accuracy.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH MODEL
entities.description: A simulation tool used to predict crop yields at harvest.

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The actual amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area.

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT INFORMATION
entities.description: Data collected from field surveys regarding crop handling and management.

entities.name: FIELD SURVEYS
entities.description: The process of collecting ground-level crop management information and data.

entities.name: GROUND DATA
entities.description: Field-collected data used to calibrate remote sensing products and perform crop classification.
